metadata.name: Handle a Retailer Going Out of Business

description: A retail customer has gone out of business and has outstanding invoices. An agent must attempt to collect the final payment.

nodes.task_description: Identify the retailer and their outstanding balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the retailer's account and list of open invoices.

nodes.task_description: Contact the retailer to arrange for final payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent attempts to contact the retailer.

nodes.task_description: If payment cannot be secured, write off the bad debt and close the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes a bad debt write-off and deactivates the customer account.
